title: lygodium expansum
intro: Lygodium expansum, also known as the climbing fern or tree fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lygodiaceae. Traditionally, Lygodium expansum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. Lygodium expansum is often prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, with some herbal preparations also involving the use of the plant's roots or leaves in combination with other herbs.
